title: Fairy Allays
description: Turns Allays into Legend of Zelda Inspired Fairies!
body:
Allays Become Fairys!

Inspired by the Legend of Zelda's fairies!

(Optifine Required)

Current Colors:

  • Blue
  • Pink
  • Yellow
  • Green
  • Purple
  • "Black" (Tael from Majora's mask)

Tutorial

Due to OptiFine having inconsistent updates and features, its recommended to use mods: EMF & ETF instead

If using OptiFine, make sure to enable these settings for complete features:

Video Settings -> Quality -> Custom Entity Models: ON
Random Entities -> ON
Emissive Textures -> ON
In order to prevent texture issues, Fairy Allays should be at the TOP of your Resource Pack list.
